item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Inside Chernobyl power plant, there is a black fungus called Cladosporium sphaerospermum.
item.description: This fungus is doing the physically impossible and feeding off deadly Gamma Radiation and using it to power itself through a process called radiosynthesis, its using melanin to convert that deadly radiation into chemical energy, basically powering its growth in a place where nothing should survive. Think of it like a plant doing photosynthesis, but instead of sunlight, it’s thriving on nuclear radiation. It’s not just surviving, it’s growing toward the radiation, like it’s craving it. It has even changed its melanin type to speed up energy production when exposed to radiation. Even a Ukrainian fungus is tough as fuck. https://www.rsb.org.uk/biologist-features/eating-gamma-radiation-for-breakfast

item.dc:creator: itsmekko

item.title: Ladies of Imgur, do you have the same experience ?
item.description: So sick of that. It's always the same. We have nice chats, we connect on many hobbies and interests, we give each other news for a while. Then I mention I have someone in my life and.... Beeeeeep........ Nobody on the other end of the line. It makes me feel unvalued as a human being. I feel like, if I were a man, it would be easier to make friends on this app. I've been on Imgur since years, and I never made a friend, ever. Everytime I end up being ghosted by someone who only saw me as a potential vagina, and never as an individual with similar passions in life. It's okay to want different things. You don't have to be a dick about it and ghost me like a coward. I know a lot of people are struggling with making friends. I just feel like, if you're a woman, you're playing hardcore mode. Anyway, just screaming at the void, feel free to downvote.
item.dc:creator: LuuzSanLyra

item.title: What Happened Today #110
item.description: ? Every Trump policy comes with its opposite. They deport legal immigrants while claiming to target criminals. They dismantle surveillance oversight after condemning it. They promise billion-dollar defense systems with no plans. They say "don’t fuck around with Medicaid" while pushing laws that gut healthcare. It’s not chaos. It’s the familiar pattern of public theater and private demolition of democratic guardrails. Do something about it, but first call your rep and senators to tell them you do not want them to support Trump's budget bill. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so you never miss what's going on. Add your email at https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/south-sudan-deportation 2. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-habeas-corpus 3. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-tips-tax 4. https://go.govbrief.today/house-trump-bill 5. https://go.govbrief.today/long-irs-confirmation 6. https://go.govbrief.today/golden-dome-175billion 7. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-surveillance-compliance 8. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-investigating-cuomo 9. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-libby-maine 10. https://go.govbrief.today/tsa-privatization-hearing 11. https://go.govbrief.today/faa-reduces-newark-flights 12. https://go.govbrief.today/mciver-toolkit Yesterday's Top Story: https://go.govbrief.today/trump-conspiracy-biden-cancer

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #113
item.description:
I know this isn’t true John Major But the movie did come out during his premiership
I’m not a huge fan of disneys live action remakes of things. But if they replaced all of them with an annual muppet remake I would watch all of them
I was thinking today why do we call being attracted to overweight people a fetish but not underweight people? I will admit this was largely just me being upset at beauty standards again
I loved this movie as a kid, I could recite most of it from memory
Every time I see this one I get real tempted to get this tattoo ngl
As someone who played a lot of yugioh as a kid this is why I don’t play anymore, just not fun at any level that’s not super casual I’m trying to start getting in to magic cause I got this vampire deck I like and I just saw they’re releasing a Spiderman set in a few months, I’ve already pre ordered too much.

item.title: Memes vol 463 Boobie
item.description:
Another edition of memes my boyfriend and I have sent each other
This is his cousin
He said no net because you can’t tell if the ball went in when I was over here thinking no net would be the least of my worries
Did you guys know Jarrett Allen is a high school musical fan. So obviously he’s my favorite player
We have the cutest picture of us in the Home Depot light section
Big Mama tax
Froggy, Scruffy, and Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax I love you @chriscaprisun
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: My family's gone; there's no one home - It's only me who's home alone - I shouldn't hear a single squeak - There shouldn't even be a creak
item.description:
So what's that thumping that I hear? It must mean one thing: death is near. "You're an adult, you'll be just fine." I tell myself as I dial "nine"...
Was that a knock upon the door? My heart beats faster than before I know it's closed; I've checked the lock. At least my killer knows to knock?
I cannot sleep, though I'm in bed. I've made amends with God instead. If He decides that it's my time, Then this will be my very last rhyme.
I hear a bang and then a break. My head shoots up; there's no mistake! I turn my music volume high So I won't hear the way I die.
I run upstairs, desk lamp in hand. Over my head, ready to land, And right before it did just that.. I remembered - I have a cat
SOURCE: https://www.artstation.com/neneart POEM: "Home Alone" by Inna Grigorenko
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1367 (sparrow slander)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I don't wanna go to Phoenix today.
Looks like a nice spot.
Hahaha so you wanted to know where I think Dragons lie on the evolutionary tree, well *cracks knuckles* (This is a real story that happened yesterday. Thanks to @feryooday to instigate via her knowlege of Genshin, and @DataDewDrop who also joined in the fun.) (I think that True Dragons, with four limbs, are highly derived Rausuchians/somewhere in Poposauroidea, while Hexapod Dragons are either invaders from another world, or a result of an independent evolutionary path from Sarcopterigian fishes in an alternative universe thar may well have used magic to get here. Or genetic manipulation.) [I may have spelled sarcopterigian wrong. Whatever, I haven't had coffee yet.]
Anyway: mom is in the hospital from a nasty fall, and Dad apparently is showing incredible signs of confusion and mom is worried, so down to Phoenix I go, once I've packed after making this post.
The ONLY AI I love and adore is the one that my friend Emi, (spacing on her Imgur username, goddamn i really need that coffee) who teaches about AI, has Trained. It is delightfully unhinged as above, and she's trained its voice to be a young Sir David Attenbourough. If her iteration became the singularity (If the singularity were to actually happen), I'd be absolutely fine with it. Oh. Right. @sisipherr
This first began in third grade when my teacher was wrong about big dinosaurs being only in swamps, and I tried to correct her multiple times, even bringing in academic sources, and she wouldn't budge.
Oblivion playthrough is going well.
Anyway. Minimal commentary now. Gotta get my crap together and pack.
Still looking for this.
Lololol
More art from ironlily.
Bwahahahahhahahaha
I do too, along with financial security.
If I ever did a DnD campaign in person again, I'd totally do this. It's so gloriously unhinged
I sometimes catch myself practicing augury. Honestly, that would be my dream job in ancient Rome.
I wonder if this is why The Orange One wants to invade Canada.
Fuck you, Sparrows are great. Lincoln's Sparrows are honestly in my top 15 favorite birds. When you get to see these Sparrows up close, or in the hand, there is a LOT of subtle beauty that I enjoy seeing. Someday, maybe, I'd like to paint that
Not how I want to be buried, but someone here is down.
Beautiful fun glorious nonsense.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "okay." *beep* ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
